column1: # Four-card teacher references for the cached 2025 GPT-OSS 120B model.
# If the cache must be refreshed, do not pull alternate layouts:
# Launch only when the current active queue is drained or deliberately paused:

#   QUEUE=scripts/queue_gptoss120b_refs.tsv GPUS="0 1 2 3" MAX_PER_GPU=1 MAX_MEM_FRACTION=0.98 SCHED=runs/.sched-gptoss120b nohup setsid bash scripts/gpu_scheduler.sh >> runs/pipeline_gptoss120b_refs.log 2>&1 &
